response.global_analysis: Dialogue and song performance detected. Dialogue transcribed from audio and confirmed with on-screen text boxes. Song performance of 'Kime Master!!' follows. The audio phonetically matches the song, but includes verses not present in the reference JSON. I have transcribed the full performance based on audio and burnt-in on-screen lyrics. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal cues, and translations maintain semantic continuity across pauses and character-specific nuances.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫大丈夫、ラミィちゃんならちょっとだけ許してくれるって♪
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay, I'm sure Lamy-chan will forgive us just a little bit.

subtitles.original: なんでラミィだけお嫁さん前提なのよっ！
subtitles.english: Why is it assumed that only Lamy is getting married?!

subtitles.original: ……いや、まだ終わってない！学寮祭はお昼から……
subtitles.english: ...No, it's not over yet! The Academy Festival starts in the afternoon...

subtitles.original: ほんのちょっとだけ、まだ時間はある！
subtitles.english: There's still just a little bit of time left!

subtitles.original: よし、とりあえず案を出してみよっか
subtitles.english: Alright, let's try coming up with some ideas for now.

subtitles.original: 学校の祭りといえば……
subtitles.english: Speaking of school festivals...

subtitles.original: 焼きそば、じゃがバター、唐揚げ、クレープ、ポテト……
subtitles.english: yakisoba, buttered potatoes, fried chicken, crepes, fries...

subtitles.original: 食べ物しかないじゃん！！
subtitles.english: It's all food!!

subtitles.original: でも今から仕込みはちょっと無理かもね
subtitles.english: But prepping ingredients might be a bit much from now on.

subtitles.original: まあできるとしたら、炎天下でカラカラな喉に染み渡る……
subtitles.english: Well, if there's one thing we can do...

subtitles.original: ラミィ水！！
subtitles.english: Lamy Water!! To quench that parched throat under the blazing sun!!

subtitles.original: これは売れるぞ〜
subtitles.english: This'll sell like crazy!

subtitles.original: やめろぉぉぉ！！！
subtitles.english: Stop it!!!

subtitles.original: うっひょおぉ！しぼり出して〜
subtitles.english: Whoo! Squeeze it out!

subtitles.original: バカなこと言ってないで！もっと真面目に考えなさいって！
subtitles.english: Stop talking nonsense! I told you to think about this more seriously!

subtitles.original: そんなに言うならラミィちゃんは何がいいの？
subtitles.english: If you say so, then what do you want to do, Lamy-chan?

subtitles.original: ラミィ？そうだなあ……やっぱり歌は歌いたいし、
subtitles.english: Me? Let me see... I definitely want to sing,

subtitles.original: バンドとか、かな？
subtitles.english: Maybe something like a band?

subtitles.original: ふつう
subtitles.english: Typical.

subtitles.original: ひねりがない〜
subtitles.english: No originality.

subtitles.original: ……フツー
subtitles.english: ...Ordinary.

subtitles.original: こいつら……！
subtitles.english: You guys...!

subtitles.original: でもまあ、歌はいいかもね〜
subtitles.english: But well, singing might be good.

subtitles.original: ショート動画用にいろいろな曲練習してるし、その中から何かやってみる？
subtitles.english: We've been practicing various songs for short videos, want to try one of those?

subtitles.original: あ、じゃあね、あれやりたい！！元気いっぱいの、ねねたちにピッタリなやつ！！
subtitles.english: Oh, then I want to do THAT one!! The energetic one that's perfect for us!!

subtitles.original: あ〜〜, あれね！
subtitles.english: Ah~~, that one!

subtitles.original: いいんじゃない！
subtitles.english: Sounds good!

subtitles.original: じゃ, とりあえずやってみますか！
subtitles.english: Then, shall we give it a try for now?

subtitles.original: キメマスター！！
subtitles.english: Kime Master!!

subtitles.original: 前人未到の未踏地だよなあ
subtitles.english: It's a so-called unexplored territory where no one has gone before, right?

subtitles.original: そいりゃー！
subtitles.english: Soiya!

subtitles.original:
キメマスター！！
作詞・作曲：Q-MHz
subtitles.english:
Kime Master!!
Lyrics & Composition: Q-MHz

subtitles.original: 生まれかわる一歩目は
subtitles.english: The first step to being reborn...

subtitles.original: 一歩目が大事さ恐れない
subtitles.english: The first step is important, don't be afraid

subtitles.original: 何度でも平気な顔で走り出して
subtitles.english: Running out with a straight face over and over again

subtitles.original: 行かなきゃ！上々の気分さ
subtitles.english: I've gotta go! I'm in the best mood

subtitles.original: やってみたいことには欲張りだね
subtitles.english: I'm greedy for the things I want to try

subtitles.original: 欲張りごめんね直さないよ
subtitles.english: Sorry for being greedy, I won't change

subtitles.original: 何度でも未来を書き換えたくなるのさ
subtitles.english: I feel like rewriting the future over and over

subtitles.original: 行かなきゃ！最高の仲間と
subtitles.english: I've gotta go! With the best companions

subtitles.original: 星になろうよ輝きたいよ
subtitles.english: Let's become stars, I want to shine

subtitles.original: 今は今だけ
subtitles.english: Right now, just for now

subtitles.original: 後悔しないようにねっ
subtitles.english: Don't let there be any regrets!

subtitles.original: さあおいで MONSTERS
subtitles.english: Come on, MONSTERS

subtitles.original: 暴れば MONSTERS
subtitles.english: Run wild, MONSTERS

subtitles.original: こんなにも無敵 PIKA STARS!
subtitles.english: So invincible, PIKA STARS!

subtitles.original: 夢が KIRA-KIRA
subtitles.english: Dreams are KIRA-KIRA

subtitles.original: 無駄に KIRA-KIRA？
subtitles.english: Uselessly KIRA-KIRA?

subtitles.original: 前進だ DOKA-DOKA!
subtitles.english: Move forward, DOKA-DOKA!

subtitles.original: はわっ 通りまる
subtitles.english: Hawa! Passing through

subtitles.original: キマッちゃってる！
subtitles.english: We're on a roll!

subtitles.original: 全速モードでよいしょっしょ
subtitles.english: In full speed mode, let's go, let's go

subtitles.original: 制限はね無視だよ
subtitles.english: Ignore the limits, you know

subtitles.original: なんでもかんでもやっぱっぱ
subtitles.english: Anything and everything, you know

subtitles.original: 全力がいいよね
subtitles.english: Full power is the best, right?

subtitles.original: 笑顔あり
subtitles.english: With smiles,

subtitles.original: キメ顔あり
subtitles.english: with cool poses

subtitles.original: 最強BIG BANG 狙っちゃえ未来！
subtitles.english: Strongest BIG BANG, aim for the future!

subtitles.original: チェストー！
subtitles.english: CHESTO!

subtitles.original: 手と取りあったらるんたった
subtitles.english: If we take each other's hands, run-ta-ta

subtitles.original: 怖くはないよね
subtitles.english: It's not scary, is it?

subtitles.original: 夢の計測メーターは振り切れそうだよ
subtitles.english: The dream measurement meter is about to max out

subtitles.original: 地球からやってきたボクらは
subtitles.english: We who came from Earth

subtitles.original: 本日も Go ahead! Go ahead!
subtitles.english: Today too, Go ahead! Go ahead!

subtitles.original: 怒られるまで？
subtitles.english: Until we get scolded?

subtitles.original: 怒られても止まらないのです
subtitles.english: Even if we get scolded, we won't stop

subtitles.original: 騒がしくてもごめんなさーい！
subtitles.english: Sorry for being noisy!

subtitles.original: 先陣誰だい？ボクらだい！
subtitles.english: Who's at the vanguard? It's us!

subtitles.original: いわゆる前人未到の未踏地だよなあ
subtitles.english: It's a so-called unexplored territory where no one has gone before, right?

subtitles.original: そいりゃー！
subtitles.english: Soiya!

subtitles.original: 譲らないないないな百歩目も
subtitles.english: The hundredth step I won't give up, up, up

subtitles.original: 百歩譲るなんて負けよダメ日よ
subtitles.english: To give in a hundred steps is a loss, it's a bad day

subtitles.original: ゴールへのロードは砂利と岩だらけで
subtitles.english: The road to the goal is full of gravel and rocks

subtitles.original: 泣いても顔は “にっかり”
subtitles.english: Even if I cry, my face is "grinning"

subtitles.original: そんな時あきらめ悪く進め
subtitles.english: At times like that, keep going with persistence

subtitles.original: だってほらあきらめたくない夢が
subtitles.english: Because, you see, the dream I don't want to give up

subtitles.original: 進化してみんなを果ての果ての空へ
subtitles.english: has evolved, taking everyone to the furthest, furthest sky

subtitles.original: 連れ去るボクら地上の子
subtitles.english: We, the children of the earth, will take you away

subtitles.original: 憧れたんだ
subtitles.english: I yearned for it

subtitles.original: 星の光は消えないときめき
subtitles.english: The starlight is an undying throb

subtitles.original: 心拍数上がりまくり
subtitles.english: Heart rate rising like crazy

subtitles.original: さあ踊んで MONSTERS
subtitles.english: Come on, dance, MONSTERS

subtitles.original: 溢れちゃお MONSTERS
subtitles.english: Let it overflow, MONSTERS

subtitles.original: 大胆で不敵 PIKA STARS!
subtitles.english: Daring and fearless, PIKA STARS!

subtitles.original: 鼓動ときめきが上昇中
subtitles.english: Throb and excitement are rising

subtitles.original: つまり絶好調中
subtitles.english: In other words, in peak condition

subtitles.original: あ、サビきます
subtitles.english: Ah, the chorus is coming

subtitles.original: たぶん勝利は
subtitles.english: Probably the victory is...

subtitles.original: キマッちゃってる！
subtitles.english: Decided!

subtitles.original: いいトコだったのに！
subtitles.english: It was just getting to the good part!

subtitles.original: バンドじゃないからせっせっせ
subtitles.english: Since we're not a band, se-se-se

subtitles.original: カッコつけなければ
subtitles.english: If we don't act cool

subtitles.original: バンドじゃないからよいよいよい
subtitles.english: Since we're not a band, yoi-yoi-yoi

subtitles.original: カッコがつくのだよ
subtitles.english: It'll look cool

subtitles.original: バカ騒ぎ やんちゃ騒ぎ
subtitles.english: Fooling around, mischievous behavior

subtitles.original: やったもん勝ち狙っちゃえ未来！
subtitles.english: Winner takes all, aim for the future!

subtitles.original: チェストー！
subtitles.english: CHESTO!

subtitles.original: 銀河のどっかの頂点に旗を立てるまで
subtitles.english: Until we plant our flag on some peak in the galaxy

subtitles.original: ニューレコードの更新は続くんだってば
subtitles.english: The updating of new records will continue, I'm telling you

subtitles.original: 地球からやってきたボクらよ
subtitles.english: We who came from Earth

subtitles.original: やりまくれ Go ahead! Go ahead!
subtitles.english: Do it all, Go ahead! Go ahead!

subtitles.original: さあ次の星へ！
subtitles.english: Now, to the next star!

subtitles.original: 一歩が百歩の始まり
subtitles.english: One step is the beginning of a hundred

subtitles.original: だから行こうよすぐに行こうよ
subtitles.english: So let's go, let's go right now

subtitles.original: 無理は道理よりも強引だなー
subtitles.english: Pushing too hard is more forceful than reason

subtitles.original: 瞬間をキミと一緒にね
subtitles.english: That moment, together with you

subtitles.original: MONSTER!
subtitles.english: MONSTER!

subtitles.original: 真っ暗な空かもしれないけどボクらは負けない
subtitles.english: It might be a pitch-black sky, but we won't lose

subtitles.original: お目々を開いてお目々を離すなよー
subtitles.english: Open your eyes, don't look away!

subtitles.original: MONSTER! HEY! MONSTER! HEY! MONSTER!
subtitles.english: MONSTER! HEY! MONSTER! HEY! MONSTER!

subtitles.original: 前人未到の宇宙に全速の全力で Goだ Yeah!!
subtitles.english: Into the unexplored universe, at full speed and full power, let's go, Yeah!!
